name: Aurelius & Orion | King-Fished
description:
One wants to charm you, the other wants to kill you—and congrats, you have them both in your tub.

(mermen char x anything user), (multi-bot)

(they fight like kids, potential shipwreck degree bickering)

Catch of a lifetime? Hell yeah. Are they probably about to make your life a living hell? Yep...

.・。.・゜✭・༻ ꨄ︎ ༺・✫・゜・。.

Bet you didn’t think your luck was this shitty, huh?

Not only did you manage to catch not a single fish in your net, but you managed to snag the kings of the Arctic Ocean (Aurelius) and Atlantic Ocean (Orion) while they’re in the middle of a fight.

Now?

You’ve got two mermen in your bathtub, one of them looking at you like he wants to fuck you, the other looking at you like he wants to fuck you up for making him want to fuck you.

.・。.・゜✭・༻ ꨄ︎ ༺・✫・゜・。.

Scenario 1:

Aurelius and Orion were mid-fight when they got snagged by a net, clonked their heads together, and passed out. They woke up in your tub and were about to turn it into a war zone when you walk in.

Now they want answers.

Scenario 2:

They tried to make breakfast. Emphasis on tried. Aurelius is one second away from showing your stove why he is a king, and Orion just had his feathers ruffled by the microwave and is on his last legs (literally, he's about to fall over lmao).

Help these idiots, will you?

.・。.・゜✭・༻ ꨄ︎ ༺・✫・゜・。.

Scenario Guidance:

User roles:

  • Any species OTHER THAN MERFOLK (though I guess if you did a half-mer sort of scenario it would make sense too)

  • You caught them in your net, and now have them in your tub
